meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding flows to overcome a lack of portfolio. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to ship your first project fast.
content.answer_block: You don't need a massive portfolio to land clients; you need a high-converting onboarding experience that demonstrates product empathy. By building a frictionless, automated onboarding flow, you prove your ability to drive user retention—the single most valuable metric for SaaS founders—instantly positioning you as an indispensable senior-level asset.
content.intro:
The blank page is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the skills, you have the drive, but you lack the social proof to command premium rates. Clients don't buy code; they buy outcomes. When you lack a portfolio, you must stop showing off features and start showing off systems that solve the 'first-mile' problem for users.

User onboarding is the heartbeat of any SaaS application. It is the bridge between a curious visitor and a paying user. By mastering this specific flow, you transform from a 'coder for hire' into a 'growth engineer.' This tutorial will show you how to leverage AI tools to build professional, production-grade onboarding flows that will convince any client you are a top-tier builder.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the minimum viable path from sign-up to 'Aha! Moment.' This ensures you aren't just building UI, but a conversion engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead Product Designer. Generate a 3-step onboarding flow for a generic SaaS that minimizes friction and maximizes user activation. Output the logic as a JSON schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project roadmap for a 3-step SaaS onboarding flow based on the provided JSON schema.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Onboarding Component
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold the core structural components of your onboarding modal, ensuring clean, modular architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a React/Tailwind component for a multi-step onboarding wizard. Include state management for step progression and progress bar animation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create the Wizard component with state persistence using React context.'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Form Validation
steps.description: Professional onboarding needs robust validation. Build a system that gives instant, helpful feedback to the user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Zod schema for a user profile onboarding form and integrate it with React Hook Form for real-time validation feedback.
steps.claude_code_command: claude refactor 'Integrate Zod validation into the existing onboarding form components.'

steps.title: Integrate Progress Analytics
steps.description: Add tracking to see where users drop off. This data-driven approach is what high-end clients crave.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a hook to track step completion in the onboarding wizard and send the data to a mock analytics endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Add telemetry hooks to track user progress through the onboarding flow.'

steps.title: Final Polish & Deployment
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a final audit and deploy the flow as a standalone demo that you can include in your portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and provide a summary of best practices for this onboarding module.

pro_tips: Always build onboarding as a decoupled module; clients love modular code that they can swap into existing apps.
Use 'optimistic UI' updates during onboarding to make the app feel instant, which significantly increases perceived quality.
Add a 'skip' option for power users; it shows you understand user psychology and respect their time.
Document your code with JSDoc comments; it makes you look like a seasoned senior dev to anyone reading your repo.
Include a 'success' state that celebrates the user; it adds a human touch that most automated flows lack.
content.next_steps: Package this onboarding module as a reusable component library, upload it to GitHub, and link it as a 'Case Study' on your portfolio site to demonstrate high-level engineering skills.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Build the system that solves real problems, and the clients will follow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
